items.title: Koeman resigns, while Netherlands report racist abuse
items.summary: Ronald Koeman resigns as Netherlands manager after their World Cup exit, which led to "appalling" racist abuse aimed at players who missed penalties.

items.title: Neville: France ‘a level above’ and Mbappe ‘on verge of greatness’
items.summary: Gary Neville says France are "a level above" any other team at the World Cup after they cruised to a 3-0 win against Sweden in the round of 32.

items.summary: THOMAS TUCHEL has revealed he is still incredibly superstitious - but he has left his lucky trainers at home. items.title: Ruthless Mbappe sets tone as France breeze past Sweden
items.summary: Kylian Mbappe helped book France's place in the World Cup round of 16 by taking his tournament total to six goals in a slick 3-0 victory over Sweden.

items.title: Mbappe scores twice as France dominate Sweden
items.summary: Kylian Mbappe becomes the all-time leading goalscorer in World Cup knockout matches with after scoring twice as France crusie past Sweden 3-0 to set up a last-16 tie with Paraguay.

items.title: Mbappe scores twice against Sweden for France
items.summary: Kylian Mbappe scores twice as France cruise to a comfortable win over Sweden in their World Cup round of 32 match at the New York New Jersey Stadium.

items.title: Barcola 'emphatically' doubles France's lead over Sweden
items.summary: Bradley Barcola "empahatically" fires home France's second goal in their World Cup round of 32 match against Sweden at the New York New Jersey Stadium.

items.title: Kylian Mbappé at the double as France swat aside Sweden in World Cup masterclass
items.summary: When people form memories of the World Cup, it’s matches like this that do it. items.title: England fans offered cheap tickets to major sporting event straight after World Cup clash against DR Congo
items.summary: ENGLAND fans have been offered cut-price tickets for the upcoming MLB game between the Atlanta Braves and the St. Louis Cardinals. items.title: France 3 Sweden 0: Kylian Mbappe level with Lionel Messi in World Cup Golden Boot race as he hunts down all-time record
items.summary: KYLIAN MBAPPE will have been dreaming of scoring the winner at the MetLife Stadium as soon as France lost the 2022 World Cup final.
